panels.title: Game Websites
panels.blurb: Launch sites for games with millions of players waiting on them. Forza for Turn 10 and Playground Games, Deceive Inc. and Rogue Waters for Tripwire, Splitgate 2 for 1047. The site is the lobby before the lobby, and it needs the same care as the game.

panels.title: Studio Websites
panels.blurb: Homes on the web for the teams behind the games. Lightspeed LA for Tencent, Turn 10 and Compulsion for Xbox, with Playground, Fast Travel, Invoke, FunPlus and Hundred Star alongside. Part brand, part recruitment, built to show a studio as it actually is.

panels.title: Brand & Identity
panels.blurb: Identities with a proper system behind them, for studios and start-ups across games and tech. Studiotypes, Enginefall, Battle Road, Atom Engine and Hey Bird! The briefs I enjoy most tend to start with an idea and let the logo follow.

panels.title: Illustration
panels.blurb: Illustration is the constant running under everything, twenty years of it, for Marvel, Image Comics, IBM and Prospect Magazine. It turns up inside the client work too, in sketches, key art and the odd cover.

panels.title: Animation
panels.blurb: Motion and 3D across trailers, brand films and real-time WebGL. I like movement that feels like it belongs to the brand, and it tends to come out a little calmer than the brief first asks for.
